title: Raise lands in 6 to 8 weeks, Portfolio follows close behind
content_html:
Three releases are now on the near-term Cryptool calendar.

Raise ships first, inside the next 6 to 8 weeks. It gives investment groups, syndicates and projects a one-click way to launch and manage fundraising pools, with member allocation, refunds and distributions handled automatically.

The refreshed Referral Programme arrives in parallel, with a cleaner revenue share model and a faster path for ambassadors to start earning.

Portfolio follows shortly after, pulling investments, vesting schedules and historical performance into a single dashboard.

Exact launch dates depend on the final round of internal testing, which is in progress now.
author: Cryptool
